name: Apple Butter Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Use the pastry to line a 9-inch pie pan, creating a high edge.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine sugar and flour. Gradually stir in the apple butter and melted butter.
3. In a separate smaller bowl, beat eggs with milk and cream. Pour this mixture into the apple butter mixture.
4. Sprinkle nutmeg on top of the filling.
5. Place the pie in a preheated 350-degree oven and bake for 50-60 minutes or until a knife inserted comes out clean.
6. Allow to cool on a rack.
